testModifications.reasoning: No test files were modified by the implementer. All 23 tests passed without changes.

criteria.criterion: pages/[project]/tickets/[ref].vue exists and reads slug + ref from useRoute() params
Two-column layout: left col is 2/3 width (col-span-2), right col is 1/3 width (col-span-1)
Title and description (white-space: pre-wrap) render from API response
Status, priority, and type display as styled Badge components
Right column shows assignee and created date metadata
Placeholder <div> slots exist for TicketActionPanel and CommentThread

reasoning: All 23 tests pass (100%). Implementation cleanly fulfills all 7 acceptance criteria. Code follows Vue 3 Composition API patterns consistent with the project (useRoute, useApi, useAsyncData, computed). Layout uses Tailwind grid-cols-3 with col-span-2/col-span-1 for correct proportions. Badges properly styled for status/priority/type. Right column displays assignee with Avatar and formatted createdAt date. Placeholder divs included for TicketActionPanel and CommentThread components. File is 153 lines, well-structured with helper functions for formatting/styling, proper TypeScript interfaces, and no console.log statements. No test modifications detected. Implementation is production-ready.
